title: Smoky Savory German Cauliflower Skillet
description: A vegan-friendly German dish featuring smoky cauliflower, this recipe is a one-pot wonder that is both flaky and umami-rich. It utilizes a bamboo tray for serving and an ice bath to shock the cauliflower.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and blanch the cauliflower florets for 5 minutes.
Immediately transfer the blanched cauliflower to an ice bath to shock it.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the smoked paprika, caraway seeds, and nutritional yeast, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the vegetable broth to the skillet and bring to a simmer.
Add the shocked cauliflower to the skillet and stir to combine with the smoky broth.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the smoky savory German cauliflower skillet in a bamboo tray, garnished with additional caraway seeds if desired.
